title: Forex Factory consolidated calendar feed
description: Schema for news/calendar.json — an array of economic-calendar events refreshed hourly by GitHub Actions.

time.description: Event time in the `timezone` field's zone. 24h HH:MM, or case-insensitive 'All Day' or 'Tentative'.

timezone.description: IANA tz name the `time`/`date` values are expressed in.

currency.description: ISO 4217-style currency code of the releasing economy.

impact.description: Forex Factory impact colour: red=high, orange=medium, yellow=low, gray=holiday/non-economic.

impact_level.description: Semantic representation of impact: high for red, medium for orange, low for yellow, holiday for gray.

detail.description: Deep link to the Forex Factory detail panel.

actual.description: Released value as printed (e.g. '4.2%', '172K'). Empty string when not yet released.

forecast.description: Consensus forecast as printed. null when absent.

previous.description: Prior period value as printed. null when absent.

day.description: Three-letter weekday of the event date.

datetime_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the event. null for non-timed events like 'All Day' or 'Tentative'.

scraped_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this snapshot was scraped.
